last_visit.problems:
Non-blocking:
  • Want to add bloods ad hoc for patients to opportunistically add for health checks/acute monitoring: to solve
  • Still want to SMS/email housebound patients to recall in Planner, just with different appointment rules (visits). Questionnaires and contact channels stay the same.
  • Optimise booking links for multiple appointments when patients need AST/COPD: Amy to solve

visits.problems:
Non-blocking:
  • Want to add bloods ad hoc for patients to opportunistically add for health checks/acute monitoring: to solve
  • Still want to SMS/email housebound patients to recall in Planner, just with different appointment rules (visits). Questionnaires and contact channels stay the same.
  • Optimise booking links for multiple appointments when patients need AST/COPD: Amy to solve

last_visit.problems:
• Anaemia rule missing: solved by 21 April
- Login errors: solved 21 April

Non-blocking:
- want opportunistic: solving by 1 May
- want housebound/no phone filterig: solved by 21 April
- Want auto-translation
- Want email as 2nd modality
- Want to be able to add bloods to recalls that aren't connected to an indication
- Wants COPD questionnaire
- Wants automated triggering, especially for followup
- Housebound patients are on Whittington ICE not TQuest 😮

last_visit.problems: Blood forms are incorrectly gendering some patients: solved by 7 May

visits.problems: Blood forms are incorrectly gendering some patients: solved by 7 May

last_visit.problems:
Blocking:
  • ICE blocked by GP name typo: solved same day!

Non-blocking:
  • Would like the ability to add bloods to the form.
  • ICE requests don’t show up in the S1 request list so they need to open ICE to edit.
  • Would like custom SMS templates.
  • Patient feedback that they didn’t understand when and how many times to take the BP.
  • Would like target filters.

visits.problems:
Blocking:
  • ICE blocked by GP name typo: solved same day!

Non-blocking:
  • Would like the ability to add bloods to the form.
  • ICE requests don’t show up in the S1 request list so they need to open ICE to edit.
  • Would like custom SMS templates.

last_visit.problems:
Non-blocking:
-  Mandatory location field means they need to check patients' address in EMIS and then manually change the location one by one.
- Hampshire Lab setting is 'Collection at hospital' but it should be 'I want to "Request Now" and "Collect Sample Later"': fixed
- Suggestion logic is inaccurate: wrongly picking up topical corticosteroids + aren't picking up anyone in their PSA search: fixed
- Investigations aren't coding QOF codes yet: fixed
- They need to edit every SMS with specific instructions to ring reception for certain patient subsets: fixed
- They would edit SMSs to "Dear Mr/Mrs. Surname" and simplifying the indication list to "diabetes", "cardiovascular health", "respiratory health" and "medication": fixed

visits.problems:
Non-blocking:
-  Mandatory location field means they need to check patients' address in EMIS and then manually change the location one by one.
- Hampshire Lab setting is 'Collection at hospital' but it should be 'I want to "Request Now" and "Collect Sample Later"': fixed
- Suggestion logic is inaccurate: wrongly picking up topical corticosteroids + aren't picking up anyone in their PSA search: fixed
- Investigations aren't coding QOF codes yet: fixed
- They need to edit every SMS with specific instructions to ring reception for certain patient subsets: fixed
- They would edit SMSs to "Dear Mr/Mrs. Surname" and simplifying the indication list to "diabetes", "cardiovascular health", "respiratory health" and "medication": fixed
